class.name: greedy_sequential::Plugin
class.description: Greedy sequential auction plugin. Each agent independently claims the lowest-cost unclaimed task. Claims are broadcast so other agents remove that task from their available pool before their own greedy selection.

class.name: coordinate_item::Plugin
class.description: Auction item representing a 2D target coordinate. Cost = Euclidean distance from the robot's current XY position to the target. AuctionItem.features: [x, y]. Requires state_component: pose.
